text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In magnificent fashion, Daiwa Scarlet has shown
the world that she's the number one Umamusume
in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, as the crucial first three years of her career
come to a close, the next step in her journey
begins.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Has it been three years already? I'm not sure I
know how to feel.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What about you? How does it feel to have stood
side by side with the top Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It was the same for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I may as well be honest, so... here goes.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I outran the competition... thanks to you. I was
able to become number one—because you were
there for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I guess... What I'm saying is...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What am I saying? C'mon, snap out of it! All this
sentimental stuff isn't like me at all!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Y-you should be getting back to work, right?!
After tomorrow, your schedule's not gonna know
what hit it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right! I'm off! See you later, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...And thank you. I'm so glad I picked you as my
trainer.
